data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Invoice generation and aging status', which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the existence or functionality of invoice generation or tracking of aging status. The absence of any concrete checks or validations related to these functionalities indicates a clear gap in the requirement fulfillment.
gaps: No evidence of invoice generation and aging status tracking.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the invoice generation and aging status.
